column1: # SS-SP Lite 16 MB flash — A/B OTA layout (EPIC-09: signed update + rollback).
# S-02-008: 64 KiB `coredump` partition carved from the tail of `storage`
# dumps are ciphertext at rest from the first release build. Layout freezes at
# first ship — changes after that require an RFC (RFC-0003 window rules).
# SIZE MARGIN: 64 KiB covers task stacks + TCBs + ELF headers for today's
# ~10-task set with headroom (DRAM capture is pinned OFF); worst-case dump
# size MUST be measured on hardware (S-02-015) and the margin recorded here
# BEFORE the layout freezes. The boot log prints each dump's partition-fill %.
